posts.author: lirankris (liran krispin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have a question about how can i extract a check list item from a workdoc with Make?

My idea is:

After every team meeting that we are writhing on Monday workdoc,

We could extract the check list of each subject in the doc and convert it to an item on a different board and start working.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@lirankris

There is no API access to monday workdocs. Therefore, currently, there is no practical way to do that.

Jim - The Monday Man
Column Magic - the magical columns toolbox app

posts.author: lirankris (liran krispin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you!

Hope it will be in the future…

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@lirankris

I agree. Hopefully, sooner rather than later.

posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
